action_items.task: Email a picture of the Axiom program certificate to the PO.
action_items.context: To mark the program condition as completed in the system before the end of the month.

action_items.task: Notify the PO immediately if Sysco HR pulls her into the office regarding her background check.
action_items.context: So the PO can intervene and attempt to save her job.

action_items.task: If notified by the client about Sysco HR, write a letter of support and call their HR department.
action_items.context: To explain the client's compliance, low risk, and work effort in an attempt to retain her employment.

action_items.task: Bring the first Sysco paystub (or Denny's paystub if Sysco employment is lost) to the next visit.

critical_updates.details: Client started a new full-time position at Sysco on Monday earning $16 an hour and resigned from La Quinta. She maintained her weekend shifts at Denny's as a safety net because she is extremely fearful of being fired from Sysco once her background check processes her felony conviction.
Client's car is still broken with transmission issues she cannot afford to fix ($800). She is currently relying on a 4:15 AM bus in the cold, causing her fatigue.
Client's mother continues to provide early morning childcare, waking the children up and taking them to school after the client leaves for work at 4:00 AM.
Client reported no new police contact. She successfully made a $50 payment toward her court fees on Friday.
Client completed the Axiom program classes last month, but the PO still needs the certificate on file to mark the condition as complete.

entities.value: consent forms for the official background check

next_episode_context: Client recently started a new, higher-paying full-time job at Sysco but is highly stressed about an impending background check revealing her felony conviction, which could result in termination. She is keeping a part-time job at Denny's as a backup. She completed the Axiom program and needs to provide the certificate to the PO. Logistically, she is heavily relying on a 4:15 AM bus and her mother's childcare support due to a broken car. Her next visit is scheduled for Thursday the 12th at 4:00 PM, where she will need to provide her new paystubs.
